name: capability_check
description: Probe target host remediation capabilities before executing mutations.

steps.name: Check sudo capability
steps.description: Verify whether the current account can elevate with sudo.

steps.name: Detect firewall type
steps.description: Identify the firewall stack on the target host.

steps.name: Check critical files
steps.description: Verify whether critical remediation-related files exist.

steps.name: Check service capability
steps.description: Verify whether service-management commands are available.

steps.name: Generate capability report
steps.description: Summarize the detected capabilities into a capability matrix.
